courses.title: C Programming
courses.description: Learn the fundamentals of C programming including variables, control structures, functions, and arrays. This course builds a strong foundation for understanding core programming concepts and system-level programming.

courses.title: Python Programming
courses.description: This course introduces Python programming from scratch. Students will learn variables, loops, functions, and file handling, making it ideal for beginners interested in programming and automation.

courses.title: Java Full Stack
courses.description: A complete full-stack development course using Java. Learn backend development with Spring Boot, build REST APIs, and integrate them with modern frontend frameworks like React.

courses.title: HTML & CSS
courses.description: Learn how to build beautiful and responsive web pages using HTML and CSS. This course covers layouts, forms, styling, flexbox, grid, and responsive design techniques.

courses.title: React Basics
courses.description: Understand the basics of React including components, props, hooks, and routing. This course helps you build modern single-page applications with reusable UI components.

courses.title: Data Science with Python
courses.description: Explore data science using Python. Learn data analysis with Pandas, numerical computing with NumPy, data visualization, and basic machine learning techniques.

courses.title: JavaScript Programming
courses.description: Learn JavaScript from the basics to advanced concepts. This course covers variables, functions, arrays, objects, DOM manipulation, and event handling.

courses.title: Node.js Development
courses.description: Build scalable backend applications using Node.js. Learn modules, file systems, creating servers, Express.js framework, and building RESTful APIs.
